name: Atelier
description: Autonomous UI/UX design agent — generates, judges, and iterates production-grade web interfaces through an 8-node DAG with deterministic gates and D-O-R-A-V consensus judges.

skills.name: Generate UI
skills.description: Generate production-grade HTML/CSS/JS from a design brief with accessibility compliance and brand alignment

skills.name: Review UI
skills.description: Review and score existing UI against D-O-R-A-V axes (Design, Originality, Relevance, Accessibility, Visual Clarity)

skills.name: Campaign Orchestration
skills.description: Orchestrate multi-surface design campaigns (12+ pages) with dependency-aware generation ordering and cross-surface coherence verification

skills.name: Design System Inference
skills.description: Infer design system tokens, patterns, and conventions from an existing codebase via PADI (Project-Agnostic Descriptor Inference)

schemes.description: Firebase ID token from Identity Platform
